# Templates

Copy one of these as the starting point for a new doc. All follow the conventions in [`docs/standards/`](../standards/).

| Template | Use for |
|---|---|
| [`page-template.md`](./page-template.md) | A route in `frontend/src/app` |
| [`feature-template.md`](./feature-template.md) | A cross-cutting product feature |
| [`component-template.md`](./component-template.md) | A reusable React component |
| [`layout-template.md`](./layout-template.md) | A Next.js layout |
| [`hook-template.md`](./hook-template.md) | A custom React hook |
| [`utility-template.md`](./utility-template.md) | A `lib/` helper function |
| [`architecture-doc-template.md`](./architecture-doc-template.md) | A system-design doc |
| [`adr-template.md`](./adr-template.md) | A formal Architecture Decision Record |
| [`rfc-template.md`](./rfc-template.md) | A proposal for review before building |
| [`design-document-template.md`](./design-document-template.md) | A larger design writeup before an RFC/ADR is warranted |
| [`deployment-guide-template.md`](./deployment-guide-template.md) | A deploy/runbook doc |
| [`api-reference-entry-template.md`](./api-reference-entry-template.md) | One REST endpoint entry |
| [`testing-guide-template.md`](./testing-guide-template.md) | A testing strategy doc for an area |
| [`bug-report-template.md`](./bug-report-template.md) | A GitHub issue reporting a bug |
| [`issue-report-template.md`](./issue-report-template.md) | A GitHub issue (feature/chore/docs) |
| [`release-notes-template.md`](./release-notes-template.md) | A `docs/releases/` entry |
| [`sprint-notes-template.md`](./sprint-notes-template.md) | Archiving a completed sprint (normally lives in Notion) |
| [`research-notes-template.md`](./research-notes-template.md) | Archiving a research spike that fed a decision |
| [`meeting-notes-template.md`](./meeting-notes-template.md) | Archiving a decision-bearing meeting |
| [`experiment-log-template.md`](./experiment-log-template.md) | Recording an experiment/spike result |
| [`checklist-template.md`](./checklist-template.md) | A generic process checklist |
| [`decision-log-entry-template.md`](./decision-log-entry-template.md) | One entry in `docs/decisions/` |
| [`changelog-entry-template.md`](./changelog-entry-template.md) | One dated entry in root `CHANGELOG.md` |
| [`technical-specification-template.md`](./technical-specification-template.md) | A full technical spec before implementation |

See [`docs/standards/documentation-style-guide.md`](../standards/documentation-style-guide.md) for when to use which, and [`docs/notion-vs-markdown.md`](../notion-vs-markdown.md) for which of these (sprint notes, research notes, meeting notes) normally belong in Notion instead.
